name: FineRead — Legal Document Scanner
description: Scan any Terms & Conditions, privacy policy, or legal document on any page. Powered by Claude AI.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src https://api.anthropic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://unpkg.com;
